full_text:
Tian Kai 田楷
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tian Kai (田楷). Appointed Inspector of Qing by Gongsun Zan and fought against Cao Cao. Tian Kai was affiliated with Gongsun Zan. Tian Kai lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
